Class ComponentBuilder<T extends ComponentBuilder<T,U>, U extends DRComponent>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<T,U>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.component.ComponentBuilder<T,U>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BreakBuilder, DimensionComponentBuilder
public abstract class ComponentBuilder<T extends ComponentBuilder<T,U>, U extends DRComponent> extends AbstractBuilder<T,U>

Abstract ComponentBuilder class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
